prompt: Create a high-fashion editorial portrait of an adult woman lying on her back on a black satin or glossy leather bedspread in a retro rock bedroom collage. Use a top-down camera angle, vertical 4:5 composition, cool desaturated monochrome palette with soft natural skin tones, realistic skin texture, cinematic magazine-photography lighting, sharp focus, and a moody rebellious atmosphere. The subject is an adult woman with long straight black hair, delicate natural facial features, silver thin-frame glasses, calm slightly dangerous eye contact looking upward at the viewer, glossy lips, and a relaxed but commanding expression. She wears a black sequined lace camisole, black asymmetric fashion top, black skirt with lace trim, black stockings, layered necklaces including a cross pendant and black bead choker, plus black bracelets. Her arms are spread outward while she grips a single silver metal chain stretched diagonally across her chest and just below her face, left hand at upper left and right hand at mid-right. Surround her with exactly 10 visible rock-bedroom collage elements: 1 large Chinese newspaper page above her head with the headline “夜晚的灵魂会发光”, 1 illustrated guitar poster partly visible on the left edge, 1 black-and-white musician photo print at the upper right, 1 small dark album-card print at the right, 1 blue-toned CD or record sleeve at the lower right, 1 framed tablet or lyric sheet cropped at the bottom right, 1 English newspaper sheet at the lower left, 1 receipt or ticket sheet near the lower center, 1 black magazine clipping reading “THE DARK MAKES US SHINE” near the lower center, and 1 black fabric square or T-shirt under the upper-right photo. Add vertical white Chinese text on the left side of the black bedspread reading 清醒的人，也会为热爱沉沦。. Keep the room background mostly hidden beneath papers, records, magazines, CDs, and original rock posters; no logos, no watermark, no extra limbs, no distorted hands, no overly sexualized pose, maintain elegant adult fashion photography.
promptEn: Create a high-fashion editorial portrait of an adult woman lying on her back on a black satin or glossy leather bedspread in a retro rock bedroom collage. Use a top-down camera angle, vertical 4:5 composition, cool desaturated monochrome palette with soft natural skin tones, realistic skin texture, cinematic magazine-photography lighting, sharp focus, and a moody rebellious atmosphere. The subject is an adult woman with long straight black hair, delicate natural facial features, silver thin-frame glasses, calm slightly dangerous eye contact looking upward at the viewer, glossy lips, and a relaxed but commanding expression. She wears a black sequined lace camisole, black asymmetric fashion top, black skirt with lace trim, black stockings, layered necklaces including a cross pendant and black bead choker, plus black bracelets. Her arms are spread outward while she grips a single silver metal chain stretched diagonally across her chest and just below her face, left hand at upper left and right hand at mid-right. Surround her with exactly 10 visible rock-bedroom collage elements: 1 large Chinese newspaper page above her head with the headline “夜晚的灵魂会发光”, 1 illustrated guitar poster partly visible on the left edge, 1 black-and-white musician photo print at the upper right, 1 small dark album-card print at the right, 1 blue-toned CD or record sleeve at the lower right, 1 framed tablet or lyric sheet cropped at the bottom right, 1 English newspaper sheet at the lower left, 1 receipt or ticket sheet near the lower center, 1 black magazine clipping reading “THE DARK MAKES US SHINE” near the lower center, and 1 black fabric square or T-shirt under the upper-right photo. Keep the room background mostly hidden beneath papers, records, magazines, CDs, and original rock posters; no logos, no watermark, no extra limbs, no distorted hands, no overly sexualized pose, maintain elegant adult fashion photography.
promptZh: 创作一张高级时尚杂志风格的人像，主角为 一位成年女性，她平躺在复古摇滚风格卧室拼贴画背景下的黑色缎面或亮面皮质床罩上。采用俯拍视角，4:5 竖构图，冷色调去饱和单色调，保留柔和的自然肤色，呈现真实的皮肤纹理，电影级杂志摄影布光，焦点清晰，营造出一种忧郁且叛逆的氛围。主角是一位 留着黑色长直发 的成年女性，五官精致自然，佩戴银色细框眼镜，眼神冷静且带着一丝危险感，直视上方的观众，嘴唇光泽，表情放松而充满掌控力。她身着 黑色亮片蕾丝吊带、黑色不对称时尚上衣、带蕾丝边的黑色短裙、黑色丝袜，叠戴项链（包括十字架吊坠和黑色珠饰颈圈），并佩戴黑色手镯。她的双臂向外伸展，双手紧握一条斜跨在胸前及面部下方的银色金属链，左手位于左上方，右手位于右中部。周围环绕着 10 个清晰可见的摇滚卧室拼贴元素：头部上方有一张巨大的中文报纸，标题为“夜晚的灵魂会发光”；左侧边缘可见一张插画吉他海报；右上角有一张黑白音乐人照片；右侧有一张小型深色专辑卡片；右下角有一张蓝色调的 CD 或唱片封套；底部右侧有一张被裁剪的平板电脑或歌词页；左下角有一张英文报纸；底部中央附近有一张收据或票据；底部中央附近有一张写有“THE DARK MAKES US SHINE”的黑色杂志剪报；右上角照片下方有一块黑色布料或 T 恤。在黑色床罩的左侧添加竖排白色中文字符，内容为 清醒的人，也会为热爱沉沦。。房间背景大部分被报纸、唱片、杂志、CD 和原版摇滚海报覆盖；无 Logo，无水印，无多余肢体，无扭曲的手部，避免过于性感的姿势，保持优雅的成人时尚摄影风格。
